action: He steps out of his tent, watching the island wake in silence, noticing smoke already rising from the central fire.
thought: They're awake already. This is going to be hard.

action: He arranges stones for a fire pit outside his house, moving with purpose, already planning the day ahead.
thought: Everything feels possible suddenly. Maybe this was right.

action: She stretches in her hammock, watching the light change, feeling the weight and realness of where she is.
thought: It felt like a dream. Now sun's rising.

description: Ryan encounters Jade near the beach at dawn. The island is quiet, the air cool and fresh.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You're up early.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Couldn't really sleep.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Yeah. I've been awake since about three.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You look like the type who wakes at three.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Is that supposed to be a compliment?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Just an observation. You built that house?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Started it yesterday. Wanted something solid before the heat gets bad.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: It's nice. Practical.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Thanks. I can help with your hammock setup if you need—

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: It's fine. Really.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Right. Okay. What's your shelter like then?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Two palms on the west side. It's peaceful.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That sounds good. Quiet.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Until you remember you're stuck here with two strangers.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: We don't have to stay strangers.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's very eager of you.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Is that a bad thing?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: No. Just hopeful. I'm not used to hopeful.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Even on day one?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Especially on day one. That's when it all feels possible.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Then let's keep it that way. Let's find out who we are together.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You talk like you've thought about this before.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I haven't. Not about this, specifically. But I believe in trying.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That might be the bravest thing about you.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Or the stupidest.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Maybe both. I should go. Walk around. Think.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Okay. But if you need anything, I'm here.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I know. That's what worries me.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Why would that worry you?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Because I might actually take you up on it.

action: He constructs a shelter extension from driftwood and palm fronds, methodical and alone.
thought: I don't know why I keep looking.

action: He gathers fruit from the inland palms and fills water gourds, eager to return to the beach.
thought: She's different. Don't mess this up.

action: She wades in the shallows near the palm grove, letting the morning cool her skin.
thought: He's too much and somehow not enough.

description: By the calm beach in morning light, Ryan finds Jade standing in the shallows, watching the horizon. He approaches with water and fruit, an offering.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Morning. Couldn't sleep?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Few hours. You?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Since sunrise. Couldn't stop thinking.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: About?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: About you being at peace on the beach.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I felt safe there. Quiet.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's rare for you?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I'm usually in my head too much.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: And now?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Now someone's here. You're intense.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Fair. I get attached quick. It's a problem.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Is it?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: My friends say so. But I can't help it.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: What do you like about me?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You're not pretending. Most people do.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I don't know how yet. Just being.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Exactly. It's real.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Or broken. You'll figure that out.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Maybe. But not today.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You're sure?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm curious. That's all I've got.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Curiosity's dangerous here.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: So is loneliness. Which scares you more?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Connection scares me. Solitude doesn't.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Then let's go slow.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Can you actually do that?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'll try. For you.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's sweet and impossible.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Why impossible?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Because you're already in deep.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: So are you.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I'm trying not to be.

action: He finds his way to the stream despite himself, drawn by the sound of water and voices.
thought: She was right. I hate being seen.

action: He leads the way to the cool stream, moving with purpose, hoping this time everyone will stay.
thought: If I stay patient, maybe he'll come around.

action: She follows the sound of water inland, her bare feet silent, moving toward something she can't name.
thought: They both scare me. But maybe that's okay.

description: By a hidden stream in the island's center, Ryan, Marcus, and Jade find themselves in their first real conversation, each learning that the other is more tender than they seemed.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Water's cold up there. Come on, get out of the heat.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Didn't know it was an invitation-only thing.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: It's not. I just meant—

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Is there really water?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Yeah, fresh stream. Come here.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: You two seem to have plans already.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Do we?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: No, I just—Marcus, you should come. Both of you.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I'm here, aren't I?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: This is nice. Quiet.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Won't last.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You're always so optimistic.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: About what?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: About the future. About us.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: There is no us. There's just three people on an island.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's not true though, is it?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: What does it have to be?

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I don't know.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: For what it's worth, I'm glad you're both here.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Even if it's complicated?

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Especially because it's complicated. No. That came out wrong.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: No, I think you meant it though.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I know what he means. This matters because it's real.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: And that's worse.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Why would it be worse?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Because real things can break.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Exactly.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Things can also heal. If you let them.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Maybe we should try that.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Or maybe we should focus on basics. Water, shelter, food.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: We can do both.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: You think everything's possible.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: It is, until it isn't.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: So we just... go day by day?

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: That's all anyone can do.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's actually kind of beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: It's not beautiful. It's survival.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Maybe it's both.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Come on. The sun's shifting. We should find dinner.

action: He walked to the eastern edge of the island and began cutting firewood with mechanical precision, each swing harder than necessary.
thought: I shouldn't have said that much. Now I can't take it back.

action: He gathered water from the stream and found himself collecting smooth stones from the beach, arranging them in a small pattern near the rocks.
thought: I can't stop thinking about her. The way she looked at me when I was talking.

action: She walked the western shore alone, her feet tracing the line where water meets sand, turning over the morning's conversation in her mind.
thought: They're both so different. One scares me open. One scares me closed.

description: By the rocks on the southern shore, Ryan encounters Jade as she walks back from her solitary wandering. The afternoon light is golden and soft.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I was hoping I'd run into you.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Were you. Or did you arrange the stones?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Is that weird? I just wanted to do something.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: They're beautiful. The stones are beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Sit with me? Just for a bit?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: People don't usually ask. They just assume.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I want to ask. I want to know what you want.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I want to sit. Yes. Just not too close yet.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Okay. Not too close.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: This morning was a lot. You and me and Marcus, all at once.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: He was real though. I've never seen him like that.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: It scared me. How much he meant what he said.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: He doesn't talk much. When he does, you listen.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: He's hurt. I think he's been hurt a long time.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Maybe. Or maybe he's just been alone.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Are they the same thing?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I don't think so. Not if you're like us.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Can you be alone without being hurt?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: No. Not really. Not if you feel things.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: How are you so sure about what people feel?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm not. I'm just open. I pay attention.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's a gift. Or a curse. I haven't decided.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: It's lonely sometimes. Seeing people and feeling nothing.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You feel things.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Around you I do.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Don't say that.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Why not? It's true.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Because I don't know what I feel back. And I don't want to hurt you.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: What if I'm okay with not knowing yet?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: No one's ever been okay with that. With me.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Then I guess I'm not like everyone else.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You're not.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Is that good?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Ask me tomorrow.
